A.title: Project Start
summary: Package ContextFlow as a distributable injectable skill with installer and standalone engine.
Refine the distribution package for cold-start behavior resilient installation and universal usage guidance.
Package ContextFlow for official Claude Code integration with MCP-lite aligned metadata and upward state search.

A.1.title: JWT work
summary: Understand how JWT works for authentication.
A.1.definitionOfDone: Understand JWT basics well enough to continue the login flow.

A.2.title: OAuth hardening
summary: Explore OAuth hardening for the login flow.
OAuth hardening must preserve the original product goal while tightening auth safety.
A.2.definitionOfDone: Choose a hardened OAuth approach for sign-in.

A.2.1.title: PKCE exchange
summary: Understand the PKCE verifier and challenge exchange.
PKCE binds the authorization code to the original client request.
Compare token introspection with local validation.
A.2.1.definitionOfDone: Understand PKCE well enough to continue implementation.

A.2.1.3.title: Token introspection note
summary: Compare token introspection with local validation.

A.2.1.4.title: Refresh token rotation
summary: Compare strict rotation against reuse detection.
Refresh rotation should reduce replay risk without breaking the sign-in flow.
A.2.1.4.definitionOfDone: Select the refresh token rotation policy.
